title: calcaratolobelia mcvaughii
intro: Calcaratolobelia mcvaughii, also known as McVaugh's lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Calcaratolobelia mcvaughii can be made into teas or infusions, and it is also used in some traditional remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
